cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is holding a toy, standing over an open toy box. The trainer is luring the dog's head over the box with a treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, clearly showing the setup: dog, toy, and the target toy box.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer says 'Guarda' and uses the treat to lure the dog to drop the toy inside the box. The moment the toy falls in, the trainer gives a jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Slow-motion as the toy is dropped into the box. A 'Jackpot!' animation and sound effect celebrate the success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Several toys are scattered on the floor. The trainer points to one toy and says 'Guarda'. The dog picks it up and drops it in the box. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera follows the dog as it completes the task for a single toy, from picking it up to dropping it in the box.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A time-lapse sequence showing the dog picking up all the scattered toys one by one and putting them in the toy box until the floor is clean. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A fast-motion time-lapse that shows the entire cleanup process, making the dog look like a super-efficient helper.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog sitting proudly next to the full toy box in a clean, tidy room. Text overlay: 'Guardar: O Parceiro da Organização'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A satisfying, clean shot of the tidy room and the proud dog. The text appears in a neat, organized font.
